body:
Pick2Play 4.1.0-beta.1 is a beta test build for the theme and raffle wheel overhaul.

This beta expands all eight themes across the app chrome, typography, drawers, navigation, bottom sheets, wheel textures, center caps, themed pointers, animated rim effects, and theme-specific spin physics. Use this build to review visual distinction, animation feel, and mobile wheel performance before a stable release.
